pageContext.name: Sauron Art Mask
pageContext.description: This is the Master-ring, the One Ring to rule them all. - Gandalf  The Dark Lord Sauron, creator of the One Ring and the Rings of Power stirs once more. Feared throughout the ages of Middle-earth, Sauron ruled from the lands of Mordor and the dreaded Barad-dûr.  Sideshow and PureArts proudly present the first officially licensed Lord of the Rings collectible with the Sauron Art Mask. Carefully sculpted from the movie reference material, the mask is paired with a hyperdetailed fully sculpted Barad-dûr mounting base with LED molten lava effect and the blazing Eye of Sauron.  Don't miss your chance to add this beautifully sculpted Lord of the Rings tribute to your collection!
